May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"initialize(address,address)":{"details":"Initializer for this contract","params":{"controller_":"Controller for this contract","owner_":"Initial owner for default admin role"}},"proxiableUUID()":{"details":"Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"rebalance(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of collateral to withdraw","collateral":"Collateral to withdraw"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"setPauseStatus(uint8)":{"details":"Gatekeeper role can set pause status","params":{"status":"New pause status"}},"setRebalanceCap(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Maximum amount rebalancer can withdraw","collateral":"Collateral to set a new cap for"}},"setSwapCap(address,uint256)":{"params":{"collateral":"Collateral token to set swap cap for","newSwapCap":"New swap cap"}},"setSwapModule(address)":{"params":{"newSwapModule":"New swap module"}},"setSwapTolerance(address,address,uint256)":{"params":{"tokenIn":"Token to be swapped","tokenOut":"Token to be returned from the swap","tolerance":"Tolerance ratio between the tokens in bps"}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"swap(bytes,bytes)":{"params":{"data":"Additional data passed to swap module","params":"Generic swap parameters used to enforce swap constraints"}},"updateController(address,address[])":{"params":{"collaterals":"Collateral addresses for this contract","newController":"New controller address"}},"upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes)":{"custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow-reachable":"delegatecall","details":"Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. fails"}]},"events":{"CollateralAdded(address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a new collateral token was added"},"ControllerUpdated(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when controller gets updated"},"Deposit(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when collateral is deposited into its underlying vault"},"PauseStatusChanged(uint8)":{"notice":"Emitted when the pause status is changed for this contract"},"Rebalance(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when rebalancer withdraws revenue"},"RebalanceCapChanged(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when the rebalance cap is changed for a collateral"},"RevenueWithdraw(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when revenue is withdrawn"},"Swap(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a swap occurs for this contract"},"SwapCapUpdated(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when token swap cap amount gets updated"},"SwapModuleUpdated(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when aggregation router gets updated"},"SwapToleranceUpdated(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when token swap tolerance amount gets updated"},"Withdraw(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when collateral is withdrawn from its underlying vault"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"ADMIN_ROLE()":{"notice":"Admin role can add new collateral types"},"COLLECTOR_ROLE()":{"notice":"Collector role can collect revenue earned by underlying vaults"},"CURATOR_ROLE()":{"notice":"Manager role can call deposit, withdraw, and swap functions"},"GATEKEEPER_ROLE()":{"notice":"Gatekeeper role can pause and unpause this contract"},"REBALANCER_ROLE()":{"notice":"Rebalancer role can withdraw collateral with cap restrictions"},"controller()":{"notice":"Controller associated with this contract"},"deposit(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit collateral into underlying vault"},"getRevenue(address)":{"notice":"Get pending revenue for a collateral type"},"pauseStatus()":{"notice":"Pause status for this contract"},"pendingRevenue(address)":{"notice":"Pending revenue for a collateral token"},"rebalance(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Allow rebalancer to withdraw collateral with limitations"},"rebalanceCap(address)":{"notice":"Maximum amount the rebalancer can withdraw per collateral"},"rescueEther()":{"notice":"Rescue ether sent to this contract"},"setRebalanceCap(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Set the maximum amount of collateral that can be withdrawn by rebalancer"},"setSwapCap(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Set the swap cap for a collateral token When swapping a collateral, the cap will be decreased If attempting to perform a swap higher than the swap cap, the swap will fail"},"setSwapModule(address)":{"notice":"Set a new swap module"},"setSwapTolerance(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Set the slippage tolerance between two collateral tokens"},"swap(bytes,bytes)":{"notice":"Swap one collateral for another"},"swapCap(address)":{"notice":"The swap cap for a specific token. When swapping collateral, the cap is decreased"},"swapModule()":{"notice":"Module for performing collateral swaps for this contract"},"swapTolerance(address,address)":{"notice":"Stores the allowed slippage between two tokens in basis points"},"updateController(address,address[])":{"notice":"Set a new controller, remove old approvals, and set new approvals When calling this function, the admin must ensure all collaterals are included in `collaterals`"},"vaults(address)":{"notice":"Vault associated with a collateral token Each collateral used by the manager must have an associated ERC4626 vault"},"withdraw(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw collateral from underlying vault"},"withdrawRevenue(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw revenue accumulated by underlying vault"}},"notice":"The collateral manager holds collateral backing assets in the Tenbin protocol The purpose of the manager is to earn yield on collateral and provide liquidity for orders Each collateral has a respective ERC4626 vault in which assets can be deposited and withdrawn On mint, collateral is transferred to this contract via transferFrom() On redeem, collateral is transferred from this contract via transferFrom() The CURATOR_ROLE manages collateral in a non-custodian manner by calling the following functions: deposit()           -> deposit collateral into an ERC4626 vault withdraw()          -> withdraw collateral from an ERC4626 vault swap()              -> swap one collateral for another collateral The COLLECTOR_ROLE collects revenue. Revenue is calculated separately from collateral. Two functions are used to manage revenue: getRevenue()        -> get pending revenue withdrawRevenue()   -> withdraw revenue from this contract The REBALANCER_ROLE is responsible for balancing on/off chain collateral, and can call the following function: rebalance()         -> withdraw collateral to a custodian account, up to a cap This is a UUPS upgradeable contract meant to be deployed behind an addCollateral(address,address).details: Add collateral support with an underlying vault and approve the controller and vault

params.collateral: Collateral used to deposit into vault
Get revenue for a specific collateral

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.owner_: Initial owner for default admin role

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

setPauseStatus(uint8).details: Gatekeeper role can set pause status

params.collateral: Collateral to set a new cap for
Collateral token to set swap cap for

params.tokenOut: Token to be returned from the swap
params.tolerance: Tolerance ratio between the tokens in bps

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

params.data: Additional data passed to swap module
params.params: Generic swap parameters used to enforce swap constraints

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

ADMIN_ROLE().notice: Admin role can add new collateral types

COLLECTOR_ROLE().notice: Collector role can collect revenue earned by underlying vaults

CURATOR_ROLE().notice: Manager role can call deposit, withdraw, and swap functions

GATEKEEPER_ROLE().notice: Gatekeeper role can pause and unpause this contract

REBALANCER_ROLE().notice: Rebalancer role can withdraw collateral with cap restrictions

getRevenue(address).notice: Get pending revenue for a collateral type

pendingRevenue(address).notice: Pending revenue for a collateral token

rebalance(address,uint256).notice: Allow rebalancer to withdraw collateral with limitations

rebalanceCap(address).notice: Maximum amount the rebalancer can withdraw per collateral

rescueEther().notice: Rescue ether sent to this contract

setRebalanceCap(address,uint256).notice: Set the maximum amount of collateral that can be withdrawn by rebalancer

setSwapCap(address,uint256).notice: Set the swap cap for a collateral token When swapping a collateral, the cap will be decreased If attempting to perform a swap higher than the swap cap, the swap will fail

setSwapTolerance(address,address,uint256.notice: Set the slippage tolerance between two collateral tokens

swapCap(address).notice: The swap cap for a specific token. When swapping collateral, the cap is decreased

swapModule().notice: Module for performing collateral swaps for this contract

swapTolerance(address,address).notice: Stores the allowed slippage between two tokens in basis points

updateController(address,address[]).notice: Set a new controller, remove old approvals, and set new approvals When calling this function, the admin must ensure all collaterals are included in `collaterals`

vaults(address).notice: Vault associated with a collateral token Each collateral used by the manager must have an associated ERC4626 vault

withdrawRevenue(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw revenue accumulated by underlying vault
